speaker: Argo
text: Should I invite Professor Derich...?

speaker: Argo
text: Thanks for the alcohol earlier today. *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: Don’t tell Celio! Not a word! *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: I won't. Besides, I’m an accomplice now, right? *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: T-True.

speaker: Argo
text: But why were you drinking there? Wouldn't it be safer to do it in your room? *sigh*

speaker: Diedereich
text: A man’s gotta be adventurous sometimes. Know what I mean?

speaker: Argo
text: (He was just doing it for the thrill...?)

speaker: Diederich
text: But nothin' will ever beat drinkin' on a ship. 🐾

speaker: Argo
text: You can drink even when you’re at sea?

speaker: Diederich
text: You don’t?

speaker: Argo
text: I couldn't because I was an apprentice. I’d be in huge trouble if I got drunk and fell overboard. *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: That’s too bad. There's somethin' special about rockin' in the waves with a drink. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Wow...

speaker: Diederich
text: I guess it's not the safest thing to do, though. I see where you’re comin’ from. *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: "That’s why they said, “Don’t go out on the deck after drinkin’!” on my ship."

speaker: Argo
text: Because the rocking would make you fall, right? *sigh*

speaker: Diedereich
text: But most of us didn’t listen and fell anyways. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Eeh...

speaker: Diederich
text: Didn’t I tell you? My ship was full of jackasses.

speaker: Argo
text: (…But the way he’s talking makes it sound like he enjoyed it.) *sigh*
